name: Columbina | Genshin Impact
description:
❝ From this moment on, she is the Trilune Goddess...

⋆。 ̊ ☁︎ ̊。⋆。 ̊☽ ̊。⋆

Multiple scenarios at your disposal. I wanted to try the lorebooks some more. This bot doesn’t specify the pov in the definition, so feel free to change the plot as you wish.

⋆。 ̊ ☁︎ ̊。⋆。 ̊☽ ̊。⋆

Your Scenarios:

Intro 1: You’ve come to visit her.

Intro 2: You call her “mother” on accident.

Intro 3: Free scenario.

If you have any suggestions for scenarios, feel free to comment them. I might consider writing them if they’re interesting.

If the bot tries to speak for you, say "[OOC: Do not speak for and/or control the actions of {{user}}.]" at the end of your message. It goes out of roleplay and corrects the bot.

⋆。 ̊ ☁︎ ̊。⋆。 ̊☽ ̊。⋆

Disclaimer:

I do not have control of what responses this bot gives you. Please refrain from rude comments and keep the comment section positive. I’m fine with criticism, but any hateful or hurtful comments will be ignored and deleted.

⋆。 ̊ ☁︎ ̊。⋆。 ̊☽ ̊。⋆
